_metadata.task: Task B - Independent verification of DPCD register first-appearance versions
sources: Linux kernel drm_dp.h (primary - contains version annotations from DP spec maintainers)
Intel/AMD kernel driver patches and documentation

0x00000.name: DPCD_REV
0x00000.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register (DP 1.1a); defined since DP 1.0

0x00001.name: MAX_LINK_RATE
0x00001.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x00002.name: MAX_LANE_COUNT
0x00002.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x00003.name: MAX_DOWNSPREAD
0x00003.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; individual bits added in later versions (TPS4 etc.)

0x00004.name: NORP
0x00004.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register (no version comment = DP 1.1a baseline); NORP defined since DP 1.0. Note: current VER_META says dp13 which appears incorrect for the register itself

0x00005.name: DOWN_STREAM_PORT_PRESENT
0x00005.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register (no version comment); defined since DP 1.0. Note: current VER_META says dp13 which appears incorrect

0x00006.name: MAIN_LINK_CHANNEL_CODING
0x00006.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; 8b/10b defined since DP 1.0, 128b/132b bit added in DP 2.0

0x00007.name: DOWN_STREAM_PORT_COUNT
0x00007.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x00008.name: RECEIVE_PORT0_CAP_0
0x00008.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x00009.name: RECEIVE_PORT0_CAP_1
0x00009.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x0000A.name: RECEIVE_PORT1_CAP_0
0x0000A.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x0000B.name: RECEIVE_PORT1_CAP_1
0x0000B.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x0000D.name: eDP_CONFIGURATION_CAP
0x0000D.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'edp v1.2 or higher' for DPCD_DISPLAY_CONTROL_CAPABLE bit; ASSR is eDP-specific

0x0000E.name: TRAINING_AUX_RD_INTERVAL
0x0000E.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; bit 7 EXT_RX_CAP_FIELD_PRESENT added in DP 1.3, bits 6:0 refined in DP 1.3

0x00023.evidence: drm_dp.h: AV_SYNC_DATA_BLOCK annotated '1.2'; Note: current VER_META says dp13 but kernel source indicates dp12

0x00024.evidence: Part of AV Sync Data Block (DP 1.2)

0x00060.name: DSC_SUPPORT
0x00060.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'DP 1.4'; DSC introduced in DP 1.4 spec (2016)

0x00067.name: DSC_MAX_BITS_PER_PIXEL_LOW
0x00067.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'eDP 1.4' annotation; but register address is part of DP 1.4 DSC block. eDP 1.4 defines usage for eDP

0x00068.name: DSC_MAX_BITS_PER_PIXEL_HIGH
0x00068.evidence: Part of DSC block (DP 1.4); eDP 1.5 added delta bits

0x0006B.name: PEAK_DSC_THROUGHPUT
0x0006B.evidence: Part of DSC block (DP 1.4); drm_dp.h notes '1.4a' for MODE_0_170 value

0x00070.name: PSR_SUPPORT
0x00070.evidence: PSR v1 introduced in eDP 1.3 (2011); drm_dp.h uncertain 'XXX 1.2?' but PSR was eDP 1.3 feature

0x00071.name: PSR_CAPABILITIES
0x00071.evidence: PSR capabilities defined alongside PSR in eDP 1.3

0x00075.name: RESERVED
0x00075.evidence: Reserved address, not assigned to any feature

0x00080.name: DOWNSTREAM_PORT_0_CAP_0
0x00080.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; downstream port caps defined since DP 1.0

0x00081.name: DOWNSTREAM_PORT_0_CAP_1
0x00081.evidence: Base register; downstream port cap byte 1

0x00091.name: RESERVED
0x00091.evidence: Reserved in our DB (drm_dp.h defines FEC_CAPABILITY_1 here for DP 2.0 but our DB treats as reserved)

0x000B0.name: PANEL_REPLAY_CAPABILITY
0x000B0.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'DP 2.0'; Panel Replay first defined in DP 2.0 (2019), extended in eDP 1.5 (2021)

0x000B2.name: SU_X_GRANULARITY[7:0]
0x000B2.evidence: Panel Replay SU granularity added in eDP 1.5

0x000B3.name: SU_X_GRANULARITY[15:8]
0x000B3.evidence: Panel Replay SU granularity added in eDP 1.5

0x000B4.name: SU_Y_GRANULARITY
0x000B4.evidence: Panel Replay SU granularity added in eDP 1.5

0x00100.name: LINK_BW_SET
0x00100.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x00101.name: LANE_COUNT_SET
0x00101.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x00102.name: TRAINING_PATTERN_SET
0x00102.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; TPS3 added in DP 1.2, TPS4 in DP 1.4

0x00107.name: DOWNSPREAD_CTRL
0x00107.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; MSA_TIMING_PAR_IGNORE_EN is eDP-related

0x0010A.name: eDP_CONFIGURATION_SET
0x0010A.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'XXX 1.2?'; eDP configuration (ASSR etc.) since eDP 1.2

0x0010C.name: LINK_QUAL_LANE1_SET
0x0010C.evidence: Part of link quality test pattern set (DP 1.2)

0x0010D.name: LINK_QUAL_LANE2_SET
0x0010D.evidence: Part of link quality test pattern set (DP 1.2)

0x0010E.name: LINK_QUAL_LANE3_SET
0x0010E.evidence: Part of link quality test pattern set (DP 1.2)

0x0010F.name: TRAINING_LANE0_1_SET2
0x0010F.evidence: drm_dp.h: no version comment = base; Post Cursor2 for HBR2

0x00110.name: TRAINING_LANE2_3_SET2
0x00110.evidence: drm_dp.h: no version comment = base; Post Cursor2

0x00115.name: LINK_RATE_SET
0x00115.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'eDP 1.4'; alternative link rate table index

0x00170.name: PSR_ENABLE_AND_CONFIGURATION
0x00170.evidence: PSR enable/config register, PSR was eDP 1.3; drm_dp.h uncertain 'XXX 1.2?' but PSR is eDP 1.3 feature

0x00200.name: SINK_COUNT
0x00200.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; defined since DP 1.0

0x00201.name: DEVICE_SERVICE_IRQ_VECTOR
0x00201.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; MST bits added in DP 1.2

0x00202.name: LANE0_1_STATUS
0x00202.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; link training status since DP 1.0

0x00210.name: SYMBOL_ERROR_COUNT_LANE0_LOW
0x00210.evidence: Symbol error counters defined since DP 1.0

0x00218.name: TEST_REQUEST
0x00218.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; compliance test since DP 1.1

0x00310.name: intel_adaptive_sync[7:0]
0x00310.evidence: Intel-proprietary DPCD; Adaptive Sync custom register in Source Device-Specific Field (0030Ch-003FFh)

0x00314.name: DPCD_00314
0x00314.evidence: Intel-proprietary DPCD in Source Device-Specific Field

0x00330.name: ALPM Sink Device Power Management State
0x00330.evidence: Vendor-specific ALPM state register in Source Device-Specific Field

0x00370.name: DPCD_00370
0x00370.evidence: AMD-proprietary PSR VTotal control register in Source Device-Specific Field

0x003F0.name: Early Scanline SDP for PSR2
0x003F0.evidence: Intel-proprietary PSR2 Early Scanline SDP support, uncertain

0x0040F.name: Specific Tcon setting for AMD
0x0040F.evidence: AMD-proprietary TCON setting in Sink Device-Specific Field (0040Ch-004FFh)

0x00416.name: AMD AUPI-LSB: Tcon FW Device ID

0x00417.name: AMD AUPI-MSB: Tcon FW Device ID

0x00600.name: SET_POWER
0x00600.evidence: drm_dp.h: base register; power management since DP 1.0

0x00704.name: EDP_GENERAL_CAPABILITY_3
0x00704.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'eDP 1.4'; added for additional eDP 1.4 features

0x00705.name: SEGMENTED_BACKLIGHT_CAPABILITY
0x00705.evidence: Segmented backlight added in eDP 1.4b specification

0x00720.name: EDP_DISPLAY_CONTROL
0x00720.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 display control block

0x00728.name: EDP_BACKLIGHT_FREQ_SET
0x00728.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 backlight frequency control

0x0072A.name: EDP_BACKLIGHT_FREQ_CAP_MIN[17:10]
0x0072A.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 backlight frequency cap

0x0072B.name: EDP_BACKLIGHT_FREQ_CAP_MIN[9:2]
0x0072B.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 backlight frequency cap

0x0072C.name: DPCD_0072C
0x0072C.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 backlight frequency cap (low bits)

0x0072D.name: EDP_BACKLIGHT_FREQ_CAP_MAX[17:10]
0x0072D.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 backlight frequency cap

0x0072E.name: EDP_BACKLIGHT_FREQ_CAP_MAX[9:2]
0x0072E.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 backlight frequency cap

0x0072F.name: DPCD_0072F
0x0072F.evidence: Part of eDP 1.2 backlight frequency cap (low bits)

0x00730.name: DPCD_00730
0x00730.evidence: Brightness optimization control, VESA DPCD mapping added in eDP 1.4b era

0x00731.name: DPCD_00731
0x00731.evidence: Segmented backlight control, added in eDP 1.4b era

0x00732.name: EDP_DBC_MINIMUM_BRIGHTNESS_SET
0x00732.evidence: DBC brightness limits added in eDP 1.4b

0x00733.name: EDP_DBC_MAXIMUM_BRIGHTNESS_SET
0x00733.evidence: DBC brightness limits added in eDP 1.4b

0x00734.name: NITS_BRIGHTNESS_CONTROL
0x00734.evidence: VESA nits brightness control, likely eDP 1.5 DPCD mapping

0x00DEF.name: HDR_2084/2020_CAPABILITY
0x00DEF.evidence: Non-standard DPCD address (not in standard 00700-007FF eDP range); likely VESA or vendor extension for HDR

0x00FEA.name: HDR_2084/2020_CAPABILITY
0x00FEA.evidence: Non-standard DPCD address; alternate HDR capability register, likely vendor extension

0x02002.name: SINK_COUNT_ESI
0x02002.evidence: drm_dp.h: ESI mirrors 0x200; ESI area defined in DP 1.2

0x02006.name: PSR_ERROR_STATUS
0x02006.evidence: PSR error status, PSR was eDP 1.3; drm_dp.h uncertain but PSR is eDP 1.3

0x02007.name: PSR_EVENT_STATUS
0x02007.evidence: PSR event status, part of eDP 1.3 PSR block

0x02008.name: PSR_STATUS
0x02008.evidence: PSR state machine status, part of eDP 1.3 PSR block

0x02009.name: DPCD_02009
0x02009.evidence: drm_dp.h: 'edp 1.4'; synchronization latency in sink, but VER_META says edp13. Kernel annotation says eDP 1.4

0x02200.name: DPCD_REV_EXTENDED
0x02200.evidence: Extended Receiver Capability area introduced in DP 1.3 (via EXTENDED_RECEIVER_CAP_FIELD_PRESENT bit)

0x02202.name: DPCD_02202
0x02202.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: max lane count mirror

0x02207.name: DPCD_02207
0x02207.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: downstream port count mirror

0x02208.name: DPCD_02208
0x02208.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: Rx Port 0 cap mirror

0x02209.name: BUFFER_SIZE_0
0x02209.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: buffer size mirror

0x0220A.name: DPCD_0220A
0x0220A.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: Rx Port 1 cap mirror

0x0220B.name: BUFFER_SIZE_1
0x0220B.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: buffer size 1 mirror

0x0220D.name: DPCD_0220D
0x0220D.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: eDP config cap mirror

0x0220E.name: DPCD_0220E
0x0220E.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: training interval mirror

0x0220F.name: DPCD_0220F
0x0220F.evidence: Extended Receiver Cap: adapter cap mirror

0x02214.name: DPCD_02214
0x02214.evidence: drm_dp.h: '2.0 E11'; DPRX Feature Enumeration List Cont. 1

0xF0000.name: VENDOR_SPECIFIC_FIELD_START
0xF0000.evidence: Vendor-specific DPCD address space (F0000h-FFFFFh) defined since DP 1.0
